title: plantago lanceolata var. dubia
intro: Plantago lanceolata var. dubia, also known as the narrow-leaved plantain, is a variety of the plantain plant that belongs to the Plantaginaceae family. This perennial herb is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The plant's leaves and roots have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory problems, and offer health benefits like reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Plantago lanceolata var. dubia can be prepared as a tincture, tea, or salve, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health concerns.
